PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(STR(YEAR(?date)) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?tournament wdt:P1346 wd:Q6392428 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'ncaa'))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
